Filter settings by Chinese label, English keyword, or internal feature name, such as item, tooltip, or cache.
screen.simple_translate.settings.categor: Translation model, language, and translation style.
All translation features and detailed configuration per feature.
API, key, model, language, and translation style.
Chat messages, batched context, and chat hover text.
Item tooltips, books, advancements, and interface hover text.
Signs, entity names, and text display entities.
Scoreboard, boss bars, titles, subtitles, and action bar.
Cache manager, import/export, server sharing, terms, and blacklist.
Hold Original, request batching, and compatibility tuning.
screen.simple_translate.settings.global_: When off, all translation rendering and new requests stop, and cached translations are not shown.
screen.simple_translate.settings.back_to: Return to the translation feature overview.
screen.simple_translate.settings.cache_e: When enabled, translations are saved in the current world/server cache and can display instantly next time.
screen.simple_translate.settings.term_au: Helps detect repeated terms so future model output can stay consistent.
How many times a candidate term appears before it enters automatic term reference. Lower is more eager; higher is more conservative.
screen.simple_translate.settings.max_in_: Limits simultaneous batches in the direct translation pipeline. The default is usually best.
screen.simple_translate.settings.direct_: Briefly waits for nearby requests to join the same batch. Lower is faster; higher batches more aggressively.
screen.simple_translate.settings.custom_: Fix CJK Custom Font Missing Glyphs

When enabled, translated Chinese/Japanese/Korean text that accidentally keeps a server resource-pack font is rendered with the default font instead. Private-use icons and decorative glyphs keep their original font.
screen.simple_translate.settings.request: Adjust translation batch concurrency and batching delay. The defaults are recommended.
screen.simple_translate.token_monitor.to: View API token usage statistics and recent request history for this session.
screen.simple_translate.token_monitor.en: When enabled, records token usage for each translation request. No data is recorded when disabled.
screen.simple_translate.token_monitor.di: Monitor is disabled. Enable it to start recording.
screen.simple_translate.model_settings.t: Configure API URL, key, model id, protocol, and request concurrency.
screen.simple_translate.model_settings.a: Enter the provider's real API URL, not an admin page, website home page, or example.com placeholder. OpenAI-compatible gateways usually use https://host/v1.
The provider API key used for translation requests. The field masks the saved value.
screen.simple_translate.model_settings.m: The model id to call. If left empty, the selected API format supplies its default model.
screen.simple_translate.model_settings.a: Select the provider protocol. This affects the request body and default model.
screen.simple_translate.model_settings.m: Limits simultaneous model requests. Higher values can respond faster but may hit rate limits.
screen.simple_translate.model_settings.c: Run a real translation-protocol probe with the current URL, key, format, and model. It only passes when the model returns text the game can restore.
screen.simple_translate.language_setting: Configure source language, target language, and global translation style.
Default: auto-detect any source language and translate to Simplified Chinese.
Choose the source language to detect. Auto is best for maps, chat, and item text that mix languages.
Choose the output language. Changing it resets in-flight requests and isolates caches by language.
When source language is custom, enter a language code such as pt_br, it, or th.
When target language is custom, enter a language code. Target cannot use auto detection.
Changing language clears pending translations. Cache entries are isolated by language pair.
screen.simple_translate.thinking.tooltip: Lets supported reasoning models think before translating. This is usually slower and uses more tokens. DeepSeek, OpenAI reasoning models, Claude, and Gemini receive provider-specific parameters; ordinary models are left unchanged.
screen.simple_translate.chat_translation: Configure chat messages, button mode, contextual translation, and chat hover text.
screen.simple_translate.book_translation: Configure book page and book hover-text translation.
screen.simple_translate.item_tooltip_tra: Configure item tooltip translation when hovering items.
screen.simple_translate.title_translatio: Configure titles, subtitles, action bars, and title-history chat output.
Configure scoreboard, boss bar, and other HUD text translation.
screen.simple_translate.sign_translation: Configure sign auto translation, manual context mode, and scan range.
screen.simple_translate.advancement_tran: Configure advancement toast and advancement screen translation.
screen.simple_translate.entity_translati: Configure entity-name translation and scan radius.
screen.simple_translate.text_display_tra: Configure floating text display entity translation.
screen.simple_translate.term_manager.too: Manage fixed terminology so model output stays consistent.
screen.simple_translate.cache_manager.to: View, edit, import, or export the local translation cache.
screen.simple_translate.blacklist_manage: Manage text entries that should not be translated.
Enter exact text or a term that translation should skip.
screen.simple_translate.blacklist.add.to: Add the input text to the blacklist.
screen.simple_translate.blacklist.export: Export the current blacklist to the config folder.
screen.simple_translate.blacklist.import: Import and merge a blacklist from the config folder.
screen.simple_translate.chat.enabled.too: Master toggle for chat message translation.
screen.simple_translate.chat.mode.toolti: Button mode translates only the clicked message. Auto mode translates foreign chat messages as they arrive and can use batched context.
screen.simple_translate.chat.hover_enabl: Translate hover text inside chat messages. Choose automatic hover requests or shortcut-only requests below.
screen.simple_translate.chat.hover_trigg: Hover requests automatically while pointing at chat hover text. Shortcut requests only after pressing Translate Hovered Tooltip. Existing cache entries display immediately in either mode.
screen.simple_translate.chat.context_ena: Auto mode only. When enabled, each new chat line is translated one-by-one, referencing the specified number of prior lines for continuity; this increases API calls (one per message). Button mode never uses context.
screen.simple_translate.chat.context_cou: How many older chat messages to include as reference for each new message. Set this to 0 to avoid earlier history, save tokens, and improve cache hits.
screen.simple_translate.book.content_ena: Translate written book, writable book, and lectern book page content.
screen.simple_translate.book.hover_enabl: Translate hover text in book screens and show the result in tooltips.
screen.simple_translate.item.enabled.too: Translate item tooltip text. Choose automatic hover requests or shortcut-only requests; cached results are always reused.
screen.simple_translate.item.trigger_mod: Hover requests automatically while pointing at an item. Shortcut requests only after pressing Translate Hovered Tooltip. Existing cache entries still display immediately.
screen.simple_translate.hud.title: Title/Subtitles Translation
screen.simple_translate.hud.title.toolti: Translate the centered title and subtitle. With caption context enabled, consecutive title captions enter the batch queue for better continuity.
screen.simple_translate.hud.actionbar.to: Translate text above the hotbar. With caption context enabled, action-bar captions enter the internal ordered batch queue.
screen.simple_translate.hud.scoreboard.t: Translate scoreboard text on the side and player list surfaces.
screen.simple_translate.hud.bossbar.tool: Translate boss bar names at the top of the screen.
screen.simple_translate.hud.title_contex: When enabled, title, subtitle, and action-bar captions are translated in ordered batches with previous caption context. Chat history display is controlled by the switch below.
screen.simple_translate.hud.history_chat: Write completed title, subtitle, and action-bar translations into chat history in order, with a button to switch between translated and original text. These entries are skipped by normal chat translation.
screen.simple_translate.hud.caption_batc: Minimum time between title/action-bar LLM batches, in milliseconds. Range 500 to 10000, default 1500. Lower values respond faster but may use more request quota.
screen.simple_translate.hud.caption_coll: How long consecutive title/action-bar fragments wait to enter the same translation batch, in milliseconds. Range 500 to 30000, default 4500. Lower values are timelier; higher values provide more context.
screen.simple_translate.sign.enabled.too: Translate sign text in the world. Auto mode handles the current sign; manual mode can submit a selected group.
screen.simple_translate.sign.context_mod: Auto mode translates the current targeted sign. Manual mode lets keybinds select signs and submit contextual translation.
screen.simple_translate.sign.radius.tool: Scan radius for auto sign translation. Larger values cover more nearby signs.
screen.simple_translate.sign.description: Auto mode translates only the current sign; manual mode translates a selected sign group with context.
screen.simple_translate.sign.manual_hint: Manual mode: G starts/stops drag select, H translates.
screen.simple_translate.advancement.enab: Translate advancement toast and advancement screen titles and descriptions.
screen.simple_translate.entity.enabled.t: Translate names rendered on named mobs, armor stands, and similar entities.
screen.simple_translate.entity.radius.to: Limit the entity-name scan distance to avoid translating faraway entities.
screen.simple_translate.text_display.ena: Translate floating text produced by text display entities in maps.
screen.simple_translate.text_display.rad: Limit the scan distance for text display entity translation.
screen.simple_translate.save.tooltip: Save this page and return to the previous screen.
screen.simple_translate.cancel.tooltip: Discard unsaved changes on this page and return.
screen.simple_translate.cache.edit.toolt: Edit the selected cached translation text. Saving refreshes the in-game cache immediately.
screen.simple_translate.cache.edit.title: Edit Cached Translation
screen.simple_translate.cache.edit.sourc: This old cache entry did not record source text; edit from the current translation.
screen.simple_translate.cache.edit.input: Edit one JSON text node per line. Keep the node count unchanged; use \n inside a node for an embedded newline.
Write the edited text nodes back into the cached Component JSON and refresh the game immediately.
screen.simple_translate.cache.edit.error: This entry is not editable Component JSON, or the text-node count changed.
screen.simple_translate.cache.search.too: Filter cache entries by lane, surface, cache key, source text, or translated text.
screen.simple_translate.cache.server_sha: Server shared cache is enabled for this world/server. It will sync automatically when supported.
Server shared cache is disabled for this world/server.

Toggles sharing only for the current world/server. When enabled, it shares translations with the current server or LAN host; missing translations are added, local translations are never overwritten, and unsupported servers fall back to local cache.
Server Share: this connection does not support sharing; local cache is still used
Server Share: connected, queued %s, snapshot %s, sent %s, received %s
screen.simple_translate.cache.export.too: Export the current world/server cache as one save-named zip file directly in the simple_translate config folder.
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.too: Choose a cache zip, JSON, or folder to import. Zip files are read directly into the current cache, only add missing translations, keep local entries, and are not extracted into new folders.
screen.simple_translate.cache.export.don: Exported share package: %s entries / %s lanes, file: %s. You can send it directly.
screen.simple_translate.cache.export.fai: Failed to export cache. Check the log.
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.cho: Click Import and choose a cache zip, JSON, or a folder containing cache files.
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.dia: Choose Simple Translate Cache Zip or JSON
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.fol: Choose Simple Translate Cache Share Folder
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.non: No importable cache was found in the selected location.
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.wor: The selected cache package belongs to another world/server and was skipped.
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.don: Import done: added %s / existing %s / invalid %s / world mismatch %s / failed files %s.
screen.simple_translate.cache.import.fai: Failed to import cache. Check the log.
screen.simple_translate.terms.term.toolt: Enter a source term that should use a fixed translation.
screen.simple_translate.terms.translatio: Enter the fixed translation for this term, or leave empty for model translation.
screen.simple_translate.terms.add.toolti: Add the term rule from the input fields.
screen.simple_translate.terms.export.too: Export the current term dictionary to the config folder.
screen.simple_translate.terms.import.too: Import and merge a term dictionary from the config folder.
screen.simple_translate.hold_original.to: Configure temporary original-text display while holding keys.
screen.simple_translate.hold_original.ma: When disabled, all Hold Original keybinds are inactive.
screen.simple_translate.hold_original.cl: Clear the Hold Original key for %s.
screen.simple_translate.hold_original.ke: Click to record a Hold Original key for %s.
screen.simple_translate.hold_original.re: Press a key to bind, ESC to cancel
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.fea: Customize the flowing glow shown while a tooltip is being translated, with a live preview.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.ena: Shows a slowly flowing edge glow while a hovered tooltip is still being translated.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.lin: Adjusts the thickness of the brightest glow line.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.spr: Adjusts how far the soft glow spreads beyond the tooltip edge.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.spe: Sets the time for one animation cycle; a shorter cycle flows faster.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.opa: Adjusts overall glow visibility; a higher value is clearer.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.the: Selects the soft gradient palette used by the flowing glow.
screen.simple_translate.tooltip_glow.pre: This preview updates immediately when glow settings change.
Change the options above to preview them live
message.simple_translate.sign_context.ma: Enable manual context mode in Sign settings first
message.simple_translate.sign_context.no: This sign has no English text to translate
message.simple_translate.sign_context.fu: You can select up to 100 signs. Submit the current selection first
message.simple_translate.sign_context.dr: Started sign drag selection. Sweep your crosshair over signs to add them
message.simple_translate.sign_context.tr: Sign context translation is already running
message.simple_translate.sign_context.pa: Some signs were translated. Unstable signs stayed selected and can be submitted again
message.simple_translate.sign_context.fa: Sign context translation failed. Selection stayed selected; submit again later
chat.simple_translate.first_run_hint: Simple Translate is ready. Press U to open settings and enter an API key to start translating
screen.simple_translate.settings.open_fa: Failed to open Simple Translate settings. Check latest.log
screen.simple_translate.status.api_error: A recent translation request had an issue. Open settings for details, or check your API configuration and key.
